summary: Background fill defect is fixed and chart/table/body pages retain structure; remaining warnings are compact chart/table headers and some navigation/header text behavior.

dimensions.evidence: Chinese body page uses paragraph flow rather than English line-by-line wrapping.
Body page text density is visually stable and leaves acceptable end blank.
Paragraph gaps are consistent with Chinese report style.
Body flow region uses target-language composition.
No event-card page in this sample scope.
Earlier visible red block behind the table title is removed by surrounding-pixel cluster fill sampling.
Table header cells and footnotes remain small; fit warnings remain in candidate_generation_evidence.
Right-side navigation remains grouped, but page 24 output has a visible top navigation/header artifact.
Rotated Chinese navigation is readable in side rail but still needs targeted crop validation for product pass.
Tables/charts preserve geometry; several compact headers need D2 layout variants.
Candidate is visually usable but product gate must remain failed until fit and navigation warnings are repaired.

basis: manual rendered PNG inspection in current run; no offline reference used as runtime prompt input
